name: Anoushka Shankar
abstract: Anoushka Hemangini Shankar (Bengali pronunciation: [onuʃka ʃɔŋkor]; born 9 June 1981) is a British-American sitar player and musician of Indian origin, as well as an occasional writer and actress. She performs across multiple genres and styles—classical and contemporary, acoustic and electronic.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: I had my manager, Karen, reach Shankar, Anoushka Shankar. She did reach her, but she was busy.
